name: PR fetcher dry-run lists the planned gh api calls without making any network request and writes nothing to the cursor
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned_calls=' out.txt && grep -q 'no_network=true' out.txt && [ ! -f .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/cfpb-consumerfinance.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
